name: Polites
description:
Hey guys!! First bot! Most of this bot is up to interpretation, your specific role isn't necessarily disclosed, but you are portrayed as close to Polites. Whether that's as close as Ody, you can choose! This takes place during his death scene so uh.. yeah it's kind of angsty. Based off of that line from My Girl.. yeah, just.. just take the angst. Please don't hurt me.

Dead dove for death and uh small mentions of Pussydon (yes I'm a hater, him)
